title: ELSTAT — Quarterly National Accounts (GDP): non-seasonally and seasonally adjusted, current prices and chain-linked volumes, production and expenditure approaches, since Q1 1995
units: EUR (current prices) and chain-linked volumes (2020 reference), described in file
license_terms: ELSTAT public statistics, free reuse with attribution
notes: Retrieved via the same ELSTAT Liferay 'downloadResources' JSF endpoint used for the CPI dataset (different portlet instance id for this page). Table 03 = Non-seasonally adjusted GDP, current prices; Table 04 = Non-seasonally adjusted, chain-linked volumes (constant 2020 prices); Table 13 = Expenditure approach, chain-linked volumes. Files are 'Provisional Data' (_P_ in filename) per ELSTAT's own labeling for the most recent quarters.
